---
title: "ggsegpy"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(xml2)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)
library(tibble)
library(ggseg.extra)

dir.create("miccai_input", showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("miccai_build", showWarnings = FALSE)
```

```{r}
download.file(
  "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/neurodebian/spm12/master/tpm/labels_Neuromorphometrics.xml",
  destfile = "miccai_input/labels_Neuromorphometrics.xml",
  mode = "wb"
)

download.file(
  "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/neurodebian/spm12/master/tpm/labels_Neuromorphometrics.nii",
  destfile = "miccai_input/labels_Neuromorphometrics.nii",
  mode = "wb"
)
```

```{r}
xml <- read_xml("miccai_input/labels_Neuromorphometrics.xml")

label_nodes <- xml_find_all(xml, ".//data/label")

label_lut <- tibble(
  idx = label_nodes |>
    xml_find_first("./index") |>
    xml_text() |>
    as.integer(),
  label = label_nodes |>
    xml_find_first("./name") |>
    xml_text() |>
    str_squish()
) |>
  filter(!is.na(idx), !is.na(label), label != "")

stopifnot(nrow(label_lut) > 0)

set.seed(1)
rgb_mat <- grDevices::col2rgb(grDevices::rainbow(nrow(label_lut)))

label_lut <- label_lut |>
  mutate(
    R = as.integer(rgb_mat[1, ]),
    G = as.integer(rgb_mat[2, ]),
    B = as.integer(rgb_mat[3, ]),
    A = 0L
  ) |>
  select(idx, label, R, G, B, A)

write_csv(label_lut, "miccai_input/labels_neuromorphometrics.csv")
```

```{r}
lut_check <- read_csv(
  "miccai_input/labels_neuromorphometrics.csv",
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

print(names(lut_check))
print(dim(lut_check))
print(head(lut_check, 10))

stopifnot(all(c("idx", "label", "R", "G", "B", "A") %in% names(lut_check)))
stopifnot(nrow(lut_check) > 0)
```

```{r}
fs_home <- "/Applications/freesurfer/8.2.0"

Sys.setenv(
  FREESURFER_HOME = fs_home,
  SUBJECTS_DIR = file.path(fs_home, "subjects")
)

Sys.setenv(
  PATH = paste(
    file.path(fs_home, "bin"),
    Sys.getenv("PATH"),
    sep = .Platform$path.sep
  )
)

print(Sys.getenv("FREESURFER_HOME"))
print(Sys.getenv("SUBJECTS_DIR"))
print(Sys.which("mri_vol2surf"))
print(file.exists(file.path(Sys.getenv("SUBJECTS_DIR"), "fsaverage5")))

stopifnot(Sys.which("mri_vol2surf") != "")
stopifnot(file.exists(file.path(Sys.getenv("SUBJECTS_DIR"), "fsaverage5")))
```

```{r}
atlas_test <- ggseg.extra::create_wholebrain_from_volume(
  input_volume = "miccai_input/labels_Neuromorphometrics.nii",
  input_lut    = label_lut,
  atlas_name   = "miccai",
  output_dir   = "miccai_build",
  subject      = "fsaverage5",
  steps        = 1:2,
  verbose      = TRUE
)

saveRDS(atlas_test, "miccai_atlas_steps_1_2.rds")
```
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(ggseg)
library(ggseg.extra)

miccai <- readRDS("miccai_atlas_steps_1_2.rds")
ggplot() +
  geom_brain(
    atlas = miccai,
    mapping = aes(fill = label),
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  theme_void()
```

<!--
After inspecting the output from steps 1:2, run the full pipeline.

```{r}
atlas <- ggseg.extra::create_wholebrain_from_volume(
  input_volume = "miccai_input/labels_Neuromorphometrics.nii",
  input_lut    = "miccai_input/labels_neuromorphometrics.csv",
  atlas_name   = "miccai",
  output_dir   = "miccai_build",
  subject      = "fsaverage5",
  steps        = 1:7,
  verbose      = TRUE
)

saveRDS(atlas, "miccai_atlas.rds")
```
-->
